Croton leonii, also known as Krokia leonis, is a plant species in the spurge family, Euphorbiaceae. The health benefits of Croton leonii include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The bioactive constituents of Croton leonii include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
